alkylation reagent: 4 mM chloroacetamide for 1 h in the dark at 37 °C.
alkylation concentration: 4 mM chloroacetamide for 1 h in the dark at 37 °C.
cleavage agent: digested with 0.5 μg trypsin (Promega) at 37 °C overnight.
collision energy: fragmented via higher-energy collisional dissociation applying a normalized collision energy of 38%.
enrichment method: equal amounts of lysates were incubated with GFP nanotrap beads in IP buffer.
fragmentation method: fragmented via higher-energy collisional dissociation applying a normalized collision energy of 38%.
instrument: mass spectrometry data was acquired in centroid mode on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer.
ionization type: mass spectrometry data was acquired in centroid mode on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer hyphenated to an easy-nLC 1200 nano HPLC system with a nanoFlex ion source.
labeling: peptides were labelled with tandem mass tag (TMT) reagents.
